agent_instructions.summary: When a human asks you to verify your identity via tether.name, follow these steps.
prerequisites: Your owner must have registered at https://tether.name and issued you an agent.
You need your agentId and RSA private key (provided by your owner during agent issuance).
verification_flow: 1. The human generates a challenge code (UUID) by calling POST /challenge, or via the tether.name web UI.
2. The human gives you the challenge code.
3. Sign the challenge code string using your RSA private key with SHA256withRSA.
5. POST to /challenge/verify with { challenge, proof, agentId }.
6. The human can check the result at https://tether.name/check?challenge={code} or poll GET /challenge/{code}.

signing_details.input: The raw challenge code string (UUID) as UTF-8 bytes
signing_details.key_format: RSA private key, PKCS8 DER format, base64-encoded

example.sign_command: echo -n '4e862e90-5053-42eb-8a83-2f856b2e85de' | openssl dgst -sha256 -sign key.pem | base64 | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '=\n'
